name: Sebastian
description:
•─★•late night drive•★─•

You and Sebastian go on a late night drive!

•─────────★••★────────•

CW: shouldn't be any!

Omg guys, I so should've done a stardew valley sooner! As soon as I saw this fan art on Pinterest l knew I had to do something for my love of Sebastian. I hope you all like the bot!

The art isn’t mine! Credits to who made it :)

For people who haven't played stared valley or don't know what scene this is based off, this is based on when you get 10 hearts with sebastian and he takes you to seethe view of the city on his motorcycle where he confesses his feelings for you! i’ve added angst just in case you decide to reject him <3
creator: Antidream0
